arts.ttl: Graham Potter set to be appointed as West Ham boss after Julen Lopetegui sacking
arts.sum: The Hammers will host a press conference at 9am on Thursday morning.

arts.ttl: Thursday’s briefing: Spurs claim controversial win as West Ham look to new era
arts.sum: Graham Potter is set to be announced as the new Hammers boss on Thursday.

arts.ttl: “Remarkable” | Classy Lopetegui earns respect of West Ham fans
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui has won the respect of West Ham fans via his classy conduct. After days of frustration and drama, Julen Lopetegui is no longer West Ham United’s head coach. He’s been hanging onto his job by the skin of his teeth, but he couldn’t do so any longer. Results have been poor, but performances... arts.ttl: “Strong interest” | West Ham eye first signing of Potter era
arts.sum: West Ham eye Arsenal defender to solve their defensive woes. While much of the blame for West Ham’s abysmal defensive record has been placed on the now departed Julen Lopetegui, there’s no denying that individuals have also been at fault. When he’s played, Areola has been absolutely woeful, Mavropanos and Todibo both have mistakes in... arts.ttl: Inside West Ham's scattergun recruitment strategy that leaves managers high and dry - and what the Premier League's best-run clubs would do differently
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Now, they sit 14th in the Premier League and continue to languish behind the likes of Brighton, Brentford, Bournemouth, Fulham and Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Ipswich beat Everton to £21m Aston Villa star Jaden Philogene - just SIX MONTHS after he returned to his boyhood side on a five-year deal
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 22-year old was also wanted by Everton but Ipswich have moved quickly to agree terms and Philogene has agreed to the move after speaking to Kieran McKenna.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest enquire about loan deal for Douglas Luiz - with the former Aston Villa midfielder also offered to both Manchester clubs and Fulham
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Luiz, who plays for the same club as his girlfriend, Alisha Lehmann, has played just 13 times for Juventus this season and could already be on his way out of the club.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui bequeaths identity-free West Ham and major challenges for Potter | Jacob Steinberg
arts.sum: Spaniard was always the wrong choice and Potter is walking into a job where surgery is required alongside a clear vision Julen Lopetegui was always the wrong choice. West Ham were warned against appointing him last May, but they pressed ahead and have paid the price. They are seven points above the bottom three after spending more than £100m last summer, the football has been drab, supporters are disengaged and the only surprise is that it has taken this long for West Ham to part with the Spaniard. So much for a fresh start. West Ham were ready to move on from David Moyes, whose reign ran out of steam last season, but they have made a spectacular hash of the succession plan. Lopetegui was not the coach to oversee a style revolution. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa agree £21m transfer as medical booked with Premier League club
arts.sum: Last week, Emery admitted that a loan move was one option for Philogene, since he believes in his potential. Villa took up their option to match the offer and Philogene opted to return to Unai Emery’s squad instead.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news as £25m Donyell Malen demand made and Douglas Luiz primed for move
arts.sum: Barry has been back at Villa for a week as the club decides where the player's future lies after spending another six months at Stockport County on top of the whole of last season. Villa opened the bidding at £15million, but Dortmund reputedly want closer to £25million, which is around what they paid PSV Eindhoven for the Netherlands international three-and-a-half years ago.
